question: Qual a taxa de cancelamento de documentos por organização de vendas em 2026?
manual_sql:
WITH docs AS (
SELECT f.BillingDocument, f.NIDSalesOrganization, MAX(CASE WHEN f.BillingDocumentIsCancelled = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DocumentoCancelado
FROM dbo.F_Invoice f
WHERE f.BillingDocumentDate / 10000 = 2026
GROUP BY f.BillingDocument, f.NIDSalesOrganization
)
SELECT so.TSalesOrganization AS OrganizacaoVendas, COUNT(*) AS TotalDocumentos, SUM(d.DocumentoCancelado) AS DocumentosCancelados,
100.0 * SUM(d.DocumentoCancelado) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS TaxaCancelamento
FROM docs d JOIN dbo.D_SalesOrganization so ON d.NIDSalesOrganization = so.NIDSalesOrganization
GROUP BY so.TSalesOrganization
ORDER BY TaxaCancelamento DESC, TotalDocumentos DESC, OrganizacaoVendas;

question: Qual a taxa de cancelamento de documentos por canal de distribuição e por mês em 2026?
manual_sql:
WITH docs AS (
SELECT (f.BillingDocumentDate / 100) % 100 AS Mes, f.BillingDocument, f.NIDDistributionChannel, MAX(CASE WHEN f.BillingDocumentIsCancelled = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DocumentoCancelado
FROM dbo.F_Invoice f
WHERE f.BillingDocumentDate / 10000 = 2026
GROUP BY (f.BillingDocumentDate / 100) % 100, f.BillingDocument, f.NIDDistributionChannel
)
SELECT d.Mes, dc.TDistributionChannel AS CanalDistribuicao, COUNT(*) AS TotalDocumentos, SUM(d.DocumentoCancelado) AS DocumentosCancelados,
100.0 * SUM(d.DocumentoCancelado) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS TaxaCancelamento
FROM docs d JOIN dbo.D_DistributionChannel dc ON d.NIDDistributionChannel = dc.NIDDistributionChannel
GROUP BY d.Mes, dc.TDistributionChannel
ORDER BY d.Mes, TaxaCancelamento DESC, TotalDocumentos DESC, CanalDistribuicao;

question: Quais são os 3 tipos de documento de faturação com maior taxa de cancelamento de documentos em 2026?
manual_sql:
WITH docs AS (
SELECT f.BillingDocument, f.NIDBillingDocumentType, MAX(CASE WHEN f.BillingDocumentIsCancelled = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DocumentoCancelado
FROM dbo.F_Invoice f
WHERE f.BillingDocumentDate / 10000 = 2026
GROUP BY f.BillingDocument, f.NIDBillingDocumentType
), rates AS (
SELECT bdt.TBillingDocumentType AS TipoDocumentoFaturacao, COUNT(*) AS TotalDocumentos, SUM(d.DocumentoCancelado) AS DocumentosCancelados,
100.0 * SUM(d.DocumentoCancelado) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS TaxaCancelamento
FROM docs d JOIN dbo.D_BillingDocumentType bdt ON d.NIDBillingDocumentType = bdt.NIDBillingDocumentType
GROUP BY bdt.TBillingDocumentType
)
SELECT TipoDocumentoFaturacao, TotalDocumentos, DocumentosCancelados, TaxaCancelamento
FROM rates
ORDER BY TaxaCancelamento DESC, TotalDocumentos DESC, TipoDocumentoFaturacao
LIMIT 3;

question: Quais são os 2 canais de distribuição com maior taxa de cancelamento de documentos dentro de cada mês em 2026?
manual_sql:
WITH docs AS (
SELECT (f.BillingDocumentDate / 100) % 100 AS Mes, f.BillingDocument, f.NIDDistributionChannel, MAX(CASE WHEN f.BillingDocumentIsCancelled = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DocumentoCancelado
FROM dbo.F_Invoice f
WHERE f.BillingDocumentDate / 10000 = 2026
GROUP BY (f.BillingDocumentDate / 100) % 100, f.BillingDocument, f.NIDDistributionChannel
), rates AS (
SELECT d.Mes, dc.TDistributionChannel AS CanalDistribuicao, COUNT(*) AS TotalDocumentos, SUM(d.DocumentoCancelado) AS DocumentosCancelados,
100.0 * SUM(d.DocumentoCancelado) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS TaxaCancelamento
FROM docs d JOIN dbo.D_DistributionChannel dc ON d.NIDDistributionChannel = dc.NIDDistributionChannel
GROUP BY d.Mes, dc.TDistributionChannel
), ranked AS (
SELECT r.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY r.Mes ORDER BY r.TaxaCancelamento DESC, r.TotalDocumentos DESC, r.CanalDistribuicao) AS rn
FROM rates r
)
SELECT Mes, CanalDistribuicao, TotalDocumentos, DocumentosCancelados, TaxaCancelamento
FROM ranked
WHERE rn <= 2
ORDER BY Mes, TaxaCancelamento DESC, TotalDocumentos DESC, CanalDistribuicao;

question: Qual a taxa de cancelamento de documentos por organização de vendas e por canal de distribuição em 2026?
manual_sql:
WITH docs AS (
SELECT f.BillingDocument, f.NIDSalesOrganization, f.NIDDistributionChannel, MAX(CASE WHEN f.BillingDocumentIsCancelled = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DocumentoCancelado
FROM dbo.F_Invoice f
WHERE f.BillingDocumentDate / 10000 = 2026
GROUP BY f.BillingDocument, f.NIDSalesOrganization, f.NIDDistributionChannel
)
SELECT so.TSalesOrganization AS OrganizacaoVendas, dc.TDistributionChannel AS CanalDistribuicao, COUNT(*) AS TotalDocumentos, SUM(d.DocumentoCancelado) AS DocumentosCancelados,
100.0 * SUM(d.DocumentoCancelado) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS TaxaCancelamento
FROM docs d JOIN dbo.D_SalesOrganization so ON d.NIDSalesOrganization = so.NIDSalesOrganization
JOIN dbo.D_DistributionChannel dc ON d.NIDDistributionChannel = dc.NIDDistributionChannel
GROUP BY so.TSalesOrganization, dc.TDistributionChannel
ORDER BY TaxaCancelamento DESC, TotalDocumentos DESC, OrganizacaoVendas, CanalDistribuicao;
